shadow_rat.name: Shadow Rat
shadow_rat.description: A rat wreathed in unnatural shadow.

manor_ghost.name: Manor Ghost
manor_ghost.description: A translucent figure drifting through the halls. It moans softly.

cellar_shade.name: Cellar Shade
cellar_shade.description: A dark, shifting mass that clings to the cellar walls.

forest_wolf.name: Forest Wolf
forest_wolf.description: A grey wolf with glowing amber eyes. It snarls as you approach.

forest_spider.name: Forest Spider
forest_spider.description: A spider the size of a dog. Its web glistens with dew.

mountain_troll.name: Mountain Troll
mountain_troll.description: A massive troll blocking the mountain cave. The ground shakes when it moves.

grave_wraith.name: Grave Wraith
grave_wraith.description: A figure of cold light that seeps from the ground. It does not speak. It does not need to.

shadow_knight.name: Shadow Knight
shadow_knight.description: Armor animated by nothing. The visor is empty. The sword moves with precision no living thing possesses.

oblivion_guardian.name: Oblivion Guardian
oblivion_guardian.description: Assembled from fragments of deleted code. It guards the gate between what exists and what was erased.

evil_king.name: The Evil King
evil_king.description: He sits on the throne of corruption. He has been here longer than the game. He was here before the kid started writing.

sand_golem.name: Sand Golem
sand_golem.description: A towering figure of compacted sand and stone. It reforms when you break it apart.

wasteland_wraith.name: Wasteland Wraith
wasteland_wraith.description: A pale ghost that drifts across the barren ground. It reaches for something it can never hold.

ruins_guardian.name: Ruins Guardian
ruins_guardian.description: The last defender of a civilization that no longer exists. It fights because it has forgotten how to stop.

milo.name: Milo
milo.description: A very smug looking cat. Don't let the cute face fool you. Milo has MOVES.

cave_crawler.name: Cave Crawler
cave_crawler.description: A giant insect with too many legs and mandibles dripping with venom. It skitters across the ceiling and drops down when you least expect it.

temple_sentinel.name: Temple Sentinel
temple_sentinel.description: A stone automaton carved in the likeness of an ancient warrior. Its eyes glow with fire that has burned for a thousand years. It still guards this place because no one told it to stop.
